function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the content of a source file at the given path. Returns the file content with line numbers.

file_path.description: Absolute or repository-relative path to the file to read

start_line.description: Optional starting line number to read from (1-based)

end_line.description: Optional ending line number to read to (inclusive)

function.name: run_linter
function.description: Run a code linter on a file or directory to detect style violations, syntax errors, and potential issues. Supports eslint, pylint, flake8, golangci-lint, etc.

file_path.description: Path to the file or directory to lint

linter.description: Linter to use. Auto-detected if not specified.

function.name: search_pattern
function.description: Search for a code pattern (regex or text) across the repository. Useful for finding similar implementations, usages of a function, or potential code duplication.

file_glob.description: Optional file glob filter, e.g. '*.py' or 'src/**/*.ts'

case_sensitive.description: Whether the search is case sensitive. Default: false

function.name: get_git_diff
function.description: Get the git diff for a specific commit, branch, or pull request. Shows what lines were added, modified, or removed.

ref.description: Git reference to diff. Can be a commit hash, branch name, or 'HEAD~1' for the last commit. Use 'branch_name...main' for PR diffs.

file_path.description: Optional specific file path to limit the diff to
